entity.label: Shemaiah
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: The father of a prince in the reign of Jehoiakim (Jer. 36:12).

nodes.label: Shemaiah
nodes.description: The father of a prince in the reign of Jehoiakim (Jer. 36:12).

nodes.label: Delaiah
nodes.description: A son of Shemaiah, and one of the courtiers to whom Jeremiah’s first roll of prophecy was read (Jer. 36:12).

verses.text: Then he went down into the king’s house, into the scribe’s chamber: and, lo, all the princes sat there, even Elishama the scribe, and Delaiah the son of Shemaiah, and Elnathan the son of Achbor, and Gemariah the son of Shaphan, and Zedekiah the son of Hananiah, and all the princes.
